The '''Battle of Rocrin''' was a bloody conflict that occurred during the operations of [[Task Force Vengeance]] in the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam sector]].

==Prelude==
The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] had acquired reliable information that a large [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] convoy would be transiting through the [[Rocrin system/Legends|Rocrin system]]. In response to this, the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Rage (Imperial-class)|''Rage'']] and [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|interdictor]] ''[[Compellor]]'' readied an ambush there. Unlike previous engagements, there was a modification to their standard search-and-destroy orders. [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Wooyou Senn]], desirous of learning what cargoes were being carried so as to better cripple the Rebellion's forces, issued the command that all ships be scanned before destruction. To carry out such a task, the Empire's pilots were reminded, speed was life.

==The Battle==
{{Quote|Here it is, the Rebel convoy we've been waiting for!|Unknown Imperial comm officer|<ref name="X-wing" />}}
Star Destroyer ''Rage'' and interdictor ''Compellor'' arrived undetected at the chosen interception point. Once again, starfighter support was provided by [[Avenger Squadron]] in its shielded [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptors]], Beta Squadron in its [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]], and Gamma Squadron in its [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]]. To better facilitate Gamma Squadron's protection role, its fighters were modified to carry and fire [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]].

Soon the Rebel convoy arrived, unceremoniously torn from [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] by ''Compellor'' 's [[Gravity well projector/Legends|gravity well projectors]]. Recognizing their immediate foes in the bombers of Beta Squadron, the Rebel [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wing]] escort, [[Oro Squadron]], turned on them with missiles and lasers. ''Rage'' ordered Gamma to intercept while Avenger Squadron closed in on the freighters and corvettes. The dividing kilometers were crossed and the fight began.

Avenger Squadron, dodging missiles and laserfire from the lead ship, [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvette]] ''[[Croisade]]'', established that it held technicians of some kind. In quick succession, the other ships were inspected. [[Modular conveyor]] [[Rakan (starship)|''Rakan 1'']] held a fabricator; ''Rakan 2'', to the Imperials' astonishment, had a large reactor aboard. Other goods fit for the construction of a base were also found.

Beta moved in on the convoy. However, the Rebels had placed a distress call and no sooner had the first cargo ship was destroyed did [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] from [[Ulan Squadron]] began to arrive. Knowing that the Empire trapped them through interdictor ''Compellor'' alone, the X-wings had been equipped with [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedos]] and were given the cruiser as their target. Avenger Squadron, its inspections complete, joined Gamma in facing this new threat.

Meanwhile, the convoy continued to suffer torpedo hits. Its troubles worsened when ''Rage'' came into range and added its own bombardment. With its Oro Squadron escort being destroyed around it, the Rebel starships were eradicated. Ulan Squadron failed to drive off the ''Compellor'', and the Imperial starfighters hunted down the X-wings one by one and destroyed the Rebels to the man.

==Aftermath==
Although [[Task Force Vengeance]] had scored another victory, its commanders, including Admiral Senn, were not without concern. Even as Imperial success mounted, so did the evidence of the Rebellion's substantial buildup in the sector. Furthermore, despite the convoy's loss, the Rebellion stepped up its efforts and matched the Empire's pressure. Not only did it construct ''[[Soren]]'', a starship component factory, in the [[Mobetta system/Legends|Mobetta system]], but it also assembled ''[[Calenz]]'', a shipyard capable of producing medium-sized warships, in the [[Nocto system/Legends|Nocto system]]. It was clear to both sides that the campaign was far from over.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
